item.title: Forget Black Friday, here are 30 early Cyber Monday deals that you can't miss — record discounts on S23 Ultra, Pixel Watch, and more
item.itunes:title: Forget Black Friday, here are 30 early Cyber Monday deals that you can't miss — record discounts on S23 Ultra, Pixel Watch, and more
item.itunes:author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.itunes:summary:
Quick Menu

1. Quick links
2. Top picks
3. Phones
4. Wearables
5. Tablets
6. Smart TVs
7. Headphones/earbuds
8. FAQ

Black Friday may be over, but the Cyber Monday tech deals have only just landed. 

Retailers from across the web are either extending their Black Friday offers or presenting totally new discounts, so whether you're looking for a new smartphone, tablet, or TV, you'll find the best Cyber Monday and leftover Black Friday tech deals below. 

I've been working these types of events for a decade now, so I feel qualified to recommend notable deals that go beyond your run-of-the-mill discounts. And let me tell you, this has already been a holiday shopping season for the history books. 

All of the price drops below are either breaking records or worthy of your attention for one reason or another, so take a look and see if you can get your holiday shopping done early. 

I've organized all 30 of these top deals based on their product category, so use our navigational menus to make your shopping journey a little easier. 

  • Android Central's Black Friday deal hubs:
    Phones | Tablets | Wearables | TVs | Smart Home 

Quick links

  • Amazon: Up to 60% off Amazon devices, headphones, and more
  • Best Buy: Historic price drops on phones, TVs, tech
  • Samsung: Up to $1,000 off TVs, Galaxy S23, Z Fold 5, trade-in offers
  • Walmart: Sitewide deals on appliances, games, tech
  • Verizon: Up to $1,000 off Samsung, bundle discounts, free phones
  • AT&T: Free S23 Plus, Z Flip 5, iPhone 15 with eligible trade-in/new line
  • Mint Mobile: $600 off Pixel 7 Pro, plus six months of free wireless
  • Lenovo: Up to 78% off PCs, monitors, and more
  • Dell: Up to 60% off gaming laptops, Chromebooks, and monitors
  • Hulu: Get a YEAR of streaming for $0.99 per month
  • Max: Six months of the With Ads plan for $2.99 per month 

Top picks

  • Google Pixel 7a 128GB: $499 $374 at Best Buy
  • Fossil Gen 6 44mm: $299 $179 at Amazon
  • Google Pixel 8 Pro: $999 $799 at Amazon
  • Sony WF-C700N: $119.99 $85.49 at Amazon
  • Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5: storage upgrade, up to $1,000 trade-in at Samsung
  • Motorola Razr Plus (2023): $999.99 $699.99 at Amazon
  • Samsung Galaxy S23 FE 128GB: $599.99 FREE with new line at Verizon
  • Google Pixel Watch (Silver) Wi-Fi: $349.99 $199.99 at Amazon
  • Google Pixel 7 Pro: $600 off, plus six months FREE at Mint Mobile
  • Sony WH-1000XM5: $399.99 $329.99 at Best Buy

Phones

The following is only a small sample of the many Android phones that retailers are discounting today. For a larger list of offers, take a look at our guide to the best Black Friday/Cyber Monday phone deals.

1. Google Pixel 7a 128GB: $499 $374 at Best Buy

The Google Pixel 7a is our favorite cheap Android phone of 2023, and now you can grab one for the lowest-ever price of $374 at Best Buy. The retailer is even sweetening the deal during their Cyber Monday sale by throwing in some enhanced trade-in credit and three free months of YouTube Premium streaming. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $374 | Google Store - $374 View Deal

2. Google Pixel 7 Pro: $899.99 $299.99, plus six months of free wireless with any six-month plan at Mint Mobile

Bundle the purchase of a Pixel 7 Pro with any six-month plan at Mint Mobile and the popular prepaid carrier will hook you up with a $600 discount AND an additional six months of wireless service for 100% free. That means you could be getting one of our favorite phones of last year and a full 12 months of wireless for as little as $33 per month. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $899 | Amazon - $889View Deal

3. Google Pixel 8 Pro: $999.99 $799 at Amazon

Speaking of lowest-ever prices, you can currently grab an unlocked Google Pixel 8 Pro from Amazon and save a straight $200, no strings attached. That's the biggest discount that the critically-acclaimed phone has ever received.

Price comparison: Best Buy - $799 | Google Store - $799View Deal

4. Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra 256GB: $1,199.99 As low as $299.99 with trade-in at Samsung

Use the link above and buy an unlocked Galaxy S23 Ultra through the Shop Samsung app and you'll get 25% off plus up to $800 of trade-in credit when you send in an old device. That could make the Ultra as cheap as $299 if you're able to get the max credit. This phone is peak Android technology, with a built-in stylus, some outstanding camera tech, and the customized Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 chip. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $899.99View Deal

5. OnePlus 11 5G 128GB: $699.99 $449.99 at Best Buy

Inspired by the appearance of a black hole, the OnePlus 11 is one of the most eye-catching phones on the market. Unique exterior aside, the OnePlus 11 is just as impressive on the inside, with a Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 chip and the best camera tech of any OnePlus phone yet. 

Price tracker: OnePlus - $549.99View Deal

6. Motorola Razr Plus (2023) 128GB: $999.99 $699.99 at Amazon

The price of the popular Motorola Razr Plus (2023) has been fluctuating a lot over the past few months, but the phone has never been as cheap as it is today. For $699.99, you're getting one of the best foldable phones on the market, with an efficient Snapdragon chip, durable hinge, and one of the best cover displays of any phone in its class. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $699.99 | Lenovo - $999.99View Deal

7. Moto G Stylus 5G (2023) 256GB: $399.99 $249.99 at Amazon

Looking for a phone with a built-in stylus? The Moto G Stylus 5G is one of the better options if you don't want to break the bank, featuring a 5,000mAh battery, great camera, and a vibrant 120Hz display. Right now, Amazon is slashing $150 off the price of the phone, bringing it down to just $249.99. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $299.99View Deal

8. Samsung Galaxy S23 Plus 256GB: $999.99 $799.99 at Best Buy

Buy the 256GB version of the super-balanced Galaxy S23 Plus and you'll get a straight $200 dropped off your purchase at Best Buy. The retailer will also throw in a free month of Xbox Game Pass Ultimate.

Price comparison: Amazon - $899.99View Deal

9. Samsung Galaxy S23 FE 128GB: $599.99 FREE with new line at Verizon

Samsung's brand new "Fan Edition" phone, the expertly-balanced Galaxy S23 FE, just hit store shelves on October 27th, and yet you can already grab one for FREE by simply adding a line to your wireless service with any 5G Unlimited plan at Verizon. No trade-in required. 

If you're not a Verizon customer, you can also grab the unlocked phone from one of the retailers below and get a  free $100 gift card out of the deal. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $399.99 | Amazon - $399.99View Deal

Wearables

The following is only a small sample of the many smartwatches and fitness trackers that retailers are discounting today. For a larger list of offers, take a look at our guide to the best Black Friday/Cyber Monday smartwatch deals.

10. Google Pixel Watch (Silver) Wi-Fi: $349.99 $199.99 at Amazon

Head to Amazon during the Black Friday/Cyber Monday sale and you can grab a first-gen Pixel Watch for just $199.99, which is another discount for the history books. That's a full $150 cheaper than the newer Pixel Watch 2, and if you look at our PW vs. PW2 guide, you'll find that the first-gen watch is not too much of a downgrade. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $199.99 View Deal

11. Fitbit Charge 6: $159.95 $99.95 at Best Buy

The newest fitness tracker from Fitbit has only been out for a month, and yet you can already snag a brand new Charge 6 for just shy of a Benjamin during Best Buy's Black Friday/Cyber Monday sale. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $99.95View Deal

12. Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 44mm (BT): $329.99 $259.99 at Best Buy

The Galaxy Watch 6 might be the best Android smartwatch of 2023, but that hasn't stopped Best Buy's sale from carving a sweet $70 off the price. You'll also be eligible to receive up to $235 off when you trade in. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $259.99View Deal

13. Samsung Galaxy Watch 4 Classic 42mm: $149.99 $99 at Walmart

The Galaxy Watch 4 Classic might be a few years old, but with a $99 price tag, who's complaining? More powerful and slightly more traditional-looking than the standard Watch 4, the Classic boasts some stainless steel heft and a real rotating bezel that we absolutely love.

Price comparison: Amazon - $227.97View Deal

14. Fossil Gen 6 44mm: $299 $169 at Amazon

Right now you can snag a Fossil Gen 6 smartwatch for $179, which is an epic price reduction of 43%. This hybrid timepiece boasts an efficient Qualcomm chip, loads of activity-tracking features, and great battery life with super-fast charging.View Deal

15. Garmin epix Gen 2: $899.99 $594.95 at Amazon

It's far from cheap, but the Garmin epix (Gen 2) is a great choice if you can afford it, with a rugged stainless steel construction, unique map features, and outstanding battery life. Right now you can soften the blow of the big purchase with a sweet $300 discount at Amazon.

Price comparison: Best Buy - $599.99View Deal

16. Samsung Galaxy Watch 5 Pro 45mm (LTE): $499.99 $407.99 at Amazon

If you want something a little more rugged, the Galaxy Watch 5 Pro ticks all of the boxes with a durable titanium construction, advanced health and temperature sensors, and up to three days of battery life. Pick up the LTE model today and you'll instantly save 18%. View Deal

Tablets

The following is only a small sample of the many tablets that retailers are discounting today. For a larger list of offers, take a look at our guide to the best Black Friday/Cyber Monday tablet deals.

17. Amazon Fire HD 10 (2023): $139.99 $79.99 at Amazon

It may not be the most powerful device on the market, but the Fire HD 10 handles most daily tasks with ease. Pair its versatility with an epic 43% discount at Amazon and you're looking at an early Cyber Monday deal worth cheering over. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $79.99

18. Google Pixel Tablet 128GB: $499 $399 at Best Buy

Pick up the new Google Pixel Tablet during Best Buy's Cyber Monday event and you'll save 20% on your purchase. They'll also hook you up with that charging speaker dock and three months of YouTube Premium at no additional cost. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $399View Deal

19. Samsung Galaxy Tab S8 Plus 128GB: $899.99 $599.99 at Amazon

The Tab S8 Plus boasts a 12.4-inch AMOLED display, an ultra-efficient Snapdragon processor, and software support through 2027. Now it's over 30% off at Amazon, just in time for Cyber Monday.

Price comparison: Best Buy - $599.99 | Walmart - $619View Deal

20. Samsung Galaxy Tab A7 Lite 32GB: $159.99 $99.99 at Best Buy

If you just want something simple, the Tab A7 Lite is a solid choice, with a metal frame, compact 8.7-inch screen, and up to 10 hours of battery life. Grab one  from Best Buy today and you'll only pay $100, plus the retailer will give you three months of YouTube Premium streaming for free. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $99View Deal

21. Samsung Galaxy Tab S7 Plus 128GB: $849.99 $529.99 at Walmart

Despite being a few years old, the Galaxy Tab S7 Plus still performs with the best of them, thanks to a Snapdragon 865+ processor, vibrant 12.4-inch AMOLED display, and an included S Pen stylus. Now pair those specs with a $320 discount and you're looking at a pretty fantastic deal. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $529.99View Deal

22. Samsung Galaxy Tab A8 32GB: $229.99 $139.99 at Amazon

The Galaxy Tab A8 is a mid-range tablet with a few surprising specs, such as a Snapdragon processor and massive 7,040mAh battery. Amazon is currently dropping an excellent 39% off the price of the tablet, making now a great time to buy. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $139.99 | Walmart - $149View Deal

Smart TVs

The following is only a small sample of the many smart TVs that retailers are discounting today. For a larger list of offers, take a look at our guide to the best Black Friday/Cyber Monday Android TV deals.

23. Insignia 32" Class F20 Series Fire TV: $149.99 $79.99 at Amazon

The F20 Series Fire TV from Insignia may not win any awards for innovation, but if you just want something simple, this Cyber Monday TV deal is tough to beat. For a mere $80, you get decent HD picture alongside Alexa voice control and, of course, instant access to all your favorite streaming services.

Price comparison: Best Buy - $79.99View Deal

24. Amazon 32" Fire TV 2-Series: $199.99 $109.99 at Amazon

If you're a Prime member, head to Amazon now and you can save a whopping 40% on this 32-inch 2-Series Fire TV. Sure, it's not the most feature-packed smart TV in the world, but it gives you access to all of your favorite streaming services in 720p HD with Dolby Digital Plus audio, and most importantly, it only costs $110.

Price comparison: N/AView Deal

25. Samsung 65" Class S90C OLED Smart Tizen TV: $2,099.99 $1,599.99 at Best Buy

For a limited time, Best Buy is dropping a full $500 off the price of the Class S90C Tizen TV from Samsung. This entertainment powerhouse boasts AI-powered 4K upscaling, immersive Object Tracking Sound, and more. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $1,597.99View Deal

26. LG 48" Class A2 Series OLED 4K Smart TV: $1,299.99 $549.99 at Best Buy

Whenever I'm shopping for a TV during any major shopping event, Best Buy is the first place I check. They regularly offer deals that clobber the competition, such as this offer that slashes $750 off the A2 Series 4K smart TV by LG. 

Price comparison: N/AView Deal

Headphones and earbuds

27. Sony WH-1000XM5: $399.99 $329.99 at Best Buy

The Sony XM5 are our favorite wireless headphones of the year, but we've hardly seen any discounts until now. Thanks to Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale, you can save a sweet $70 on these cans, plus the retailer will throw in four months of Sirius XM streaming for free.

Price comparison: Amazon - $328 | Walmart - $328View Deal

28. Beats Studio Pro: $349.99 $169.95 at Amazon

Head to Amazon right now and you can score an outstanding 51% discount on the Beats Studio Pro, a sophisticated pair of headphones that come complete with customizable spatial audio support, active noise cancellation with transparency mode, and up to 40 hours of battery life on a single charge. 

Price comparison: Walmart - $169.95 | Best Buy - $169.95View Deal

29. Samsung Galaxy Buds 2 Pro (White): $229.99 $124 at Amazon

If sound quality is important to you, the Galaxy Buds 2 Pro are some of the best wireless earbuds that money can buy, coming complete with 10mm drivers, active noise cancellation, and 24-bit hi res audio support. Head to Amazon and grab a pair of these buds in white and you'll save a whopping 46% on your purchase.  

Price comparison: Samsung - $159.99 | Best Buy - $159.99View Deal

30. Sony WF-C700N: $119.99 $89.99 at Best Buy

The Sony WF-C700N are a popular pick among our readers, pairing Sony's high-tech sound signature with active noise cancellation and up to 15 hours of battery life. Just in time for Cyber Monday, you can grab a pair of these buds and save a sweet 29% on your purchase.

Price comparison: Walmart - $88 View Deal

FAQ

When do Cyber Monday sales start?

Cyber Monday is November 27th, the Monday day after Thanksgiving and Black Friday, but many retailers launch their shopping events early or simply extend their Black Friday sales through the weekend. As such, we're keeping track of all the best offers early so you don't have to wait to find the best discounts on tech. 

Should I buy now or wait for Cyber Monday?

It depends on the deal. If you come across a record low price today, you may want to go ahead and jump at the opportunity, as it's unlikely that the price will drop even further once Cyber Monday hits. Of course, we'll let you know in our deal guides if we think you should go ahead and buy or wait for future discounts. 

  • Android Central's Black Friday deal hubs:
    Tech | Phones | Tablets | Wearables | TVs | Smart Home

24. Amazon 32" Fire TV 2-Series: $199.99 $109.99 at Amazon

If you're a Prime member, head to Amazon now and you can save a whopping 40% on this 32-inch 2-Series Fire TV. Sure, it's not the most feature-packed smart TV in the world, but it gives you access to all of your favorite streaming services in 720p HD with Dolby Digital Plus audio, and most importantly, it only costs $110.

Price comparison: N/AView Deal

25. Samsung 65" Class S90C OLED Smart Tizen TV: $2,099.99 $1,599.99 at Best Buy

For a limited time, Best Buy is dropping a full $500 off the price of the Class S90C Tizen TV from Samsung. This entertainment powerhouse boasts AI-powered 4K upscaling, immersive Object Tracking Sound, and more. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $1,597.99View Deal

26. LG 48" Class A2 Series OLED 4K Smart TV: $1,299.99 $549.99 at Best Buy

Whenever I'm shopping for a TV during any major shopping event, Best Buy is the first place I check. They regularly offer deals that clobber the competition, such as this offer that slashes $750 off the A2 Series 4K smart TV by LG. 

Price comparison: N/AView Deal

Headphones and earbuds

27. Sony WH-1000XM5: $399.99 $329.99 at Best Buy

The Sony XM5 are our favorite wireless headphones of the year, but we've hardly seen any discounts until now. Thanks to Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale, you can save a sweet $70 on these cans, plus the retailer will throw in four months of Sirius XM streaming for free.

Price comparison: Amazon - $328 | Walmart - $328View Deal

28. Beats Studio Pro: $349.99 $169.95 at Amazon

Head to Amazon right now and you can score an outstanding 51% discount on the Beats Studio Pro, a sophisticated pair of headphones that come complete with customizable spatial audio support, active noise cancellation with transparency mode, and up to 40 hours of battery life on a single charge. 

Price comparison: Walmart - $169.95 | Best Buy - $169.95View Deal

29. Samsung Galaxy Buds 2 Pro (White): $229.99 $124 at Amazon

If sound quality is important to you, the Galaxy Buds 2 Pro are some of the best wireless earbuds that money can buy, coming complete with 10mm drivers, active noise cancellation, and 24-bit hi res audio support. Head to Amazon and grab a pair of these buds in white and you'll save a whopping 46% on your purchase.  

Price comparison: Samsung - $159.99 | Best Buy - $159.99View Deal

30. Sony WF-C700N: $119.99 $89.99 at Best Buy

The Sony WF-C700N are a popular pick among our readers, pairing Sony's high-tech sound signature with active noise cancellation and up to 15 hours of battery life. Just in time for Cyber Monday, you can grab a pair of these buds and save a sweet 29% on your purchase.

Price comparison: Walmart - $88 View Deal

FAQ

When do Cyber Monday sales start?

Cyber Monday is November 27th, the Monday day after Thanksgiving and Black Friday, but many retailers launch their shopping events early or simply extend their Black Friday sales through the weekend. As such, we're keeping track of all the best offers early so you don't have to wait to find the best discounts on tech. 

Should I buy now or wait for Cyber Monday?

It depends on the deal. If you come across a record low price today, you may want to go ahead and jump at the opportunity, as it's unlikely that the price will drop even further once Cyber Monday hits. Of course, we'll let you know in our deal guides if we think you should go ahead and buy or wait for future discounts. 

  • Android Central's Black Friday deal hubs:
    Tech | Phones | Tablets | Wearables | TVs | Smart Home

item.title: Give your Chromebook a second monitor for $70 on Cyber Monday
item.itunes:title: Give your Chromebook a second monitor for $70 on Cyber Monday
item.itunes:author: andrew.myrick@futurenet.com (Andrew Myrick)
item.itunes:summary:
Whether you're using a Chromebook or laptop to get some work done, chances are that you'll end up hoping for more screen space, at some point. That's just one reason why I've become a believer in portable monitors, and for Cyber Monday, you can get one for less than $70! 

This 15.6-inch portable monitor from HONGO doesn't really try to do anything overly fancy. Instead, it's just a way to give yourself some extra legroom while you're getting work done. It sports a 1920 x 1080 resolution, offers dual USB-C ports, a mini-HDMI port, and even has built-in speakers. Plus, HONGO includes a smart cover that doubles as a stand, so you can throw it in your bag if you're heading on a trip, even if it's just to the local coffee shop.

HONGO 15.6'' 1080p Portable Monitor: $129.99 $69.98 (w/ on-page coupon) at Amazon

This portable monitor from HONGO isn't going to blow your mind, but it will help you get some work done. For less than $70, you'll be able to enjoy extra screen real estate from wherever you are, and it doesn't just work with Chromebooks. View Deal

HONGO 16'' 2K Portable Monitor: $199.99 $123.99 (w/ on-page coupon) at Amazon

This one's more geared towards gamers or those who just like faster refresh rates. Frankly, it's still an incredible Cyber Monday deal, regardless, as you can save almost $80 on a 16-inch, 2K portable display with a 120Hz refresh rate.View Deal

  • Android Central's Black Friday deal hubs:
    Tech | Phones | Tablets | Wearables | TVs | Smart Home

If you're someone who appreciates faster refresh rates and a higher resolution, then HONGO has you covered there, too. The company's 2K 16" portable monitor is also a great Cyber Monday deal, as it retails for $199, but between the instant discount and on-page coupon, you can get it for just $123.

In addition to sporting a 2560 x 1600 resolution, this larger monitor is also equipped with a 120Hz refresh rate, making it perfect for gamers. You can even go so far as to mount it on your desk thanks to the VESA-compatible mount on the back. Or, you can just plug in your PS5 and enjoy the latest games along with faster refresh rates. 

Cyber Monday Quick Links

  • Amazon's Black Friday deals home
  • Best Buy's Black Friday deals home
  • Walmart's Black Friday deals home
